items.title: Exodus launches AI agent-focused stablecoin on Solana
items.whyYouShouldCare: Exodus's launch of an AI agent-focused stablecoin on Solana could enhance liquidity and attract new users to the ecosystem.

items.title: AI agents fueled a frenzy of startup building at the Consensus Miami EasyA hackathon
items.whyYouShouldCare: The startup activity spurred by AI agents at the Consensus Miami EasyA hackathon indicates growing innovation and potential use cases within the Solana ecosystem.

items.title: Solana and Google Cloud Team Up for Stablecoin-Powered AI Agent Payments
items.whyYouShouldCare: The partnership between Solana and Google Cloud for stablecoin-powered AI agent payments may improve transaction efficiency and broaden the platform's appeal to developers.
